'''âr-h-s''' ('''rahasa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:electrotonize|electrotonize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-h-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:electrotonize|electrotonize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-h-s
|-
! Lemma
| rahasa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:rahasithi|rahasithi]] || [[word:rahasiji|rahasiji]] || [[word:rahasishi|rahasishi]] || [[word:rahasi|rahasi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:rahasuthuth|rahasuthuth]] || [[word:rahasujuj|rahasujuj]] || [[word:rahasushush|rahasushush]] || [[word:rahas|rahas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:rahasuthu|rahasuthu]] || [[word:rahasuju|rahasuju]] || [[word:rahasushu|rahasushu]] || [[word:rahasu|rahasu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:rahasufuth|rahasufuth]] || [[word:rahasufuj|rahasufuj]] || [[word:rahasufush|rahasufush]] || [[word:rahasuf|rahasuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:rahasethe|rahasethe]] || [[word:rahaseje|rahaseje]] || [[word:rahaseshe|rahaseshe]] || [[word:rahase|rahase]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:rahasothoth|rahasothoth]] || [[word:rahasojoj|rahasojoj]] || [[word:rahasoshosh|rahasoshosh]] || [[word:rahas|rahas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:rahasotho|rahasotho]] || [[word:rahasojo|rahasojo]] || [[word:rahasosho|rahasosho]] || [[word:rahaso|rahaso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:rahasofoth|rahasofoth]] || [[word:rahasofoj|rahasofoj]] || [[word:rahasofosh|rahasofosh]] || [[word:rahasof|rahasof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:rahasĂŠthĂŠ|rahasĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:rahasĂŠjĂŠ|rahasĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:rahasĂŠshĂŠ|rahasĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:rahasĂŠ|rahasĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:rahasathath|rahasathath]] || [[word:rahasajaj|rahasajaj]] || [[word:rahasashash|rahasashash]] || [[word:rahas|rahas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:rahasatha|rahasatha]] || [[word:rahasaja|rahasaja]] || [[word:rahasasha|rahasasha]] || [[word:rahasa|rahasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:rahasafath|rahasafath]] || [[word:rahasafaj|rahasafaj]] || [[word:rahasafash|rahasafash]] || [[word:rahasaf|rahasaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:rahasasha|rahasasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gorahasasha|gorahasasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokirahasasha|gokirahasasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:rahasnĂŒsha|rahasnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gorahasnknĂŒsha|gorahasnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokirahasnĂŒsha|gokirahasnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rahashĂ«sha|rahashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorahasnkshĂ«sha|gorahasnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirahashĂ«sha|gokirahashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rahasrosha|rahasrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorahasnkrosha|gorahasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokirahasrosha|gokirahasrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rahasmusha|rahasmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gorahasnkmusha|gorahasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirahasmusha|gokirahasmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:rahasherasha|rahasherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gorahasnksherasha|gorahasnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokirahasherasha|gokirahasherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:rahasngasha|rahasngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gorahasnkngasha|gorahasnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokirahasngasha|gokirahasngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:rahasyasha|rahasyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gorahasnkyasha|gorahasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokirahasyasha|gokirahasyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:rahasyamasha|rahasyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gorahasnkyamasha|gorahasnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokirahasyamasha|gokirahasyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:rahasnĂŒshĂ«sha|rahasnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gorahasnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gorahasnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokirahasnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokirahasnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:rahasnĂŒrosha|rahasnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorahasnknĂŒrosha|gorahasnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokirahasnĂŒrosha|gokirahasnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rahasnĂŒmusha|rahasnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorahasnknĂŒmusha|gorahasnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirahasnĂŒmusha|gokirahasnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:rahashĂ«nĂŒsha|rahashĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gorahasnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gorahasnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokirahashĂ«nĂŒsha|gokirahashĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:rahashĂ«rosha|rahashĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorahasnkshĂ«rosha|gorahasnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokirahashĂ«rosha|gokirahashĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rahashĂ«musha|rahashĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorahasnkshĂ«musha|gorahasnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirahashĂ«musha|gokirahashĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:rahasronĂŒsha|rahasronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gorahasnkronĂŒsha|gorahasnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokirahasronĂŒsha|gokirahasronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:rahasroshĂ«sha|rahasroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gorahasnkroshĂ«sha|gorahasnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokirahasroshĂ«sha|gokirahasroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rahasromusha|rahasromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorahasnkromusha|gorahasnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirahasromusha|gokirahasromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:rahasmunĂŒsha|rahasmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gorahasnkmunĂŒsha|gorahasnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokirahasmunĂŒsha|gokirahasmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:rahasmushĂ«sha|rahasmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gorahasnkmushĂ«sha|gorahasnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokirahasmushĂ«sha|gokirahasmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:rahasmurosha|rahasmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorahasnkmurosha|gorahasnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokirahasmurosha|gokirahasmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:rahas|rahas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:rĂŠhĂŠs|rĂŠhĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:horahas|horahas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:horĂŠhĂŠs|horĂŠhĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohorahas|hohorahas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohorĂŠhĂŠs|hohorĂŠhĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒrahas|nĂŒrahas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒrĂŠhĂŠs|nĂŒrĂŠhĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒrahas|nĂŒnĂŒrahas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒrĂŠhĂŠs|nĂŒnĂŒrĂŠhĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻrahas|nĂŻrahas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻrĂŠhĂŠs|nĂŻrĂŠhĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻrahas|nĂŻnĂŻrahas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻrĂŠhĂŠs|nĂŻnĂŻrĂŠhĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lurahas|lurahas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lurĂŠhĂŠs|lurĂŠhĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulurahas|lulurahas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulurĂŠhĂŠs|lulurĂŠhĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lirahas|lirahas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lirĂŠhĂŠs|lirĂŠhĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilirahas|lilirahas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilirĂŠhĂŠs|lilirĂŠhĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:korahas|korahas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:korĂŠhĂŠs|korĂŠhĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokorahas|kokorahas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokorĂŠhĂŠs|kokorĂŠhĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kerahas|kerahas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kerĂŠhĂŠs|kerĂŠhĂŠs]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekerahas|kekerahas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekerĂŠhĂŠs|kekerĂŠhĂŠs]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
